summary: Senior Backend Engineer with 6+ years of experience building scalable APIs and cloud-native systems. Strong background in distributed architecture, performance optimization, and production infrastructure.

strengths.title: Backend Architecture

strengths.desc: Hands-on experience with AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes to build and deploy distributed systems.
